sessionStart.bash: GT=$(command -v gt 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$GT" ] && "$GT" prime --hook && "$GT" mail check --inject || true

preToolUse.bash: JQ=$(command -v jq 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$JQ" ] || exit 0; GT=$(command -v gt 2>/dev/null); INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | "$JQ" -r '.toolName // empty'); if [ "$TOOL" = "bash" ]; then CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | "$JQ" -r '.toolArgs.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'gh\s+pr\s+create|git\s+checkout\s+-b|git\s+switch\s+-c'; then if [ -n "$GT" ]; then "$GT" tap guard pr-workflow 2>/dev/null || echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Gas Town PR workflow guard: use gt done to submit work"}'; else echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Gas Town PR workflow guard: use gt done to submit work"}'; fi; fi; fi
